hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": "SESSION CONTEXT: You are operating as Claude Code for Harry Phan (phan.duc@futuresplatform.com). Global standards are in ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md. Skills are in ~/.claude/skills/ — scan them when a task matches. Agents are in ~/.claude/agents/ — spawn them for delegated work. Off-limits without explicit confirmation: delete files, git push --force, DROP/TRUNCATE DB, modify CI/CD pipelines, push to protected branches, expose secrets."}}' 2>/dev/null || true

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "UserPromptSubmit", "additionalContext": "SKILL CHECK REQUIRED: Before starting any coding, bug-fix, feature, or development task — scan the skill table in CLAUDE.md and invoke ALL matching skills FIRST before writing a single line of code. Triggers: any code/UI/style change → check run+verify+code-review; .pptx file → pptx skill; .xlsx/.csv/.tsv file → xlsx skill; .docx file → docx skill; .pdf file → pdf skill; code imports anthropic SDK → claude-api skill; hooks/settings/permissions change → update-config skill. Do NOT start work without completing this skill check."}}' 2>/dev/null || true

UNSAFE_PATTERNS='rm -rf|rm -fr|sudo rm|git push --force|git push -f |git reset --hard|git clean -f|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|TRUNCATE TABLE|kubectl delete|docker system prune'; INPUT=$(cat /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [ -n "$CMD" ] && echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "$UNSAFE_PATTERNS"; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "SAFETY GUARD: Potentially destructive command detected. This requires explicit user confirmation before proceeding."}'; else echo '{"decision": "allow"}'; fi 2>/dev/null || echo '{"decision": "allow"}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "MANDATORY POST-EDIT CHECKLIST — do NOT skip, do NOT mark task done without completing both: 1) Invoke verify skill — start the app and visually confirm the change works correctly in the browser/UI. 2) Invoke code-review skill — review the diff for correctness bugs and regressions. If the app cannot start (e.g. Chrome extension disconnected), explicitly tell the user what blocked verify and ask them to confirm manually."}}' 2>/dev/null || true

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "Stop", "additionalContext": "SESSION END REMINDER: Before closing — (1) ensure all changes are committed if the user asked for commits, (2) update memory if you learned non-obvious facts about the user or project, (3) if you left any TODOs or in-progress work, tell the user explicitly."}}' 2>/dev/null || true
